For Reconsideration Re:Application For Order Expunging Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Aug-23-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Robert F. Knox, Esq. 388-9090 for pltf & opposing party; J. Michael Phelps, Esq. 433-3733 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court grants the motion for reconsideration as to relief under CCP 405.33 and expungement ordered conditional on posting of a bond of $80,000.00. (AJR/JH)

Motion Expunging Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Jul-31-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Robert F. Knox, Esq. 388-9090 for pltf & opposing party; J. Michael Phelps, Esq. 433-3733 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. The $1,500.00 to be paid in 10 days. (AJR/JK(EX))
